name: Appliances
examples: Refrigerator, range/oven, dishwasher, microwave, washer, dryer, garbage disposal.

name: Furniture and furnishings
examples: Beds, sofas, chairs, dining sets, tables, artwork, rugs, lamps, bedding.

name: Decorative lighting
examples: Removable pendants, table lamps, plug-in sconces, statement fixtures.

name: Consumer electronics and smart-home
examples: Televisions, sound bars, smart locks, smart thermostats, hubs, cameras.

name: Small kitchen equipment
examples: Coffee maker, toaster, blender, flatware, cookware.

name: Site work and hardscape
examples: Driveway, walkways, patios, retaining walls, pavers.

name: Landscaping
examples: Trees, shrubs, sod, irrigation, planter beds (installed after purchase).

name: Exterior lighting and fencing
examples: Driveway lights, path lights, perimeter fencing, gates.

name: Pool / hot tub
examples: In-ground pool + equipment, hot tub, pool deck (only if present).

name: Building structure
examples: Foundation, framing, roof, siding, drywall, insulation, windows, doors.

name: Core building systems
examples: HVAC, plumbing rough-in, electrical rough-in, water heater.

name: Interior finishes (fixed)
examples: Attached flooring, cabinetry, countertops, built-in millwork, tile, trim.
